reviews.title: Still bumping
reviews.text: Loud sounds from such a small speaker. It’s no B&W or Bang but it works as advertised. I seems to be a bit base heavy but hey I think that’s what most kids are expecting these days. I use to be into heavy base for a bit but now I prefer a quality tone so I can see which demographic is targeted with this product. It’s fair for the price and the quality is good. Haven’t had any issues yet with an single part.

reviews.title: Fans of Beats won’t be disappointed

reviews.author: Larry

reviews.title: If you have the money, buy it.
reviews.text: Honestly I don’t know why people are complaining about sound quality and how loud the speaker actually is. I have it at the second lowest volume preset and if I go any louder it’ll start being too loud for my current location. If you have the money and like it buy it. If you want to buy it for an aesthetic of having Apple devices then do it. It’s worth the money. JBL, Sony and Bose are good as well, out of those 3 only Sony really compares to the beats in my opinion. But it if you want it.
reviews.author: Artic
